comments.author: @richardu.7996
comments.text: As I watch this in 2026 I am transported back to Bucharest in  the summer of 74' when I passed through trying to get to Turkey and Greece(which was cancelled due to the war over Cyprus). I do not remember streets filled with outdoor cafes, throngs of happy people or lots of lights.  A police state to be sure but not as crazy as it later became. But the spirit of their last Dear Leader lives on here in the USA. You know who that is.  Well, thanks for the video.

comments.author: @GlobeDiscovery-NY
comments.text: Driving on the Transfăgărășan is a dream, but anyone planning to go there needs to be aware of the brown bears. They literally sit on the side of the road waiting for food from tourists now. Local authorities constantly warn people not to roll down their windows or stop to take selfies!

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: "Crucial safety tip for Romania's epic road! 🇷🇴 🐻 Wildlife habituation on Transfăgărășan is no joke. Would you still brave the drive for those views?"

comments.author: @RealLifeFilesDoc
comments.text: Romania is so much more than a cinematic myth. The real fascinating shift here is how a nation with deep historical roots is navigating the modern European landscape. For those who know the culture firsthand, what is the biggest misconception outsiders have about modern Romania today?

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: "Spot-on analysis! 🇷🇴 🇪🇺 Moving past the 'Dracula myth' to showcase Romania's tech boom and modern identity is crucial. In your eyes, what's one cultural detail outsiders overlook the most?"

comments.author: @telehappy_usa
comments.text: The landscapes are absolutely breathtaking, and the women are stunning. Which season is the best time to visit Romania like this?

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: Romania hits different in autumn for colorful forests, or late spring for green valleys! 🇷🇴 🍂 Are you leaning toward a summer road trip or a cozy winter vibe?"

comments.author: @globerealife
comments.text: Romania faces a stark reality where millions have emigrated for better wages in Western Europe, yet its domestic tech sector is rapidly scaling into a multi-billion-dollar market. Will this digital economic rise be enough to bring the lost generation of professionals back home to rebuild their country?

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: "Such a sharp economic contrast! 🇷🇴 💻 Brain drain vs. tech boom is Romania's biggest modern crossroads. Do you think high-paying tech jobs alone can pull people back, or is it more about lifestyle and infrastructure?"

comments.author: @GlobalCountryExplorer
comments.text: Romania feels like one of Europe's hidden gems. The mountain roads are spectacular, but it's the history, traditions, and warmth of the people that make me want to see it in person.

comments.author: @CountryTravelDocumentary
comments.text: Romania is so much more than the Dracula legend. 🇷🇴 After watching this, what's the first place you'd want to visit—the castles of Transylvania, the Carpathian Mountains, or the colorful villages? Tell us your choice and why! 👇

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: Hard choice! 🇷🇴 ⛰️ Transylvania gets the fame, but those pristine Carpathian hiking trails hit different. If you had to pick just one, are you going for historical castles or raw nature?"
